description.value: You have found a way to pour more of yourself into each act of channeling, letting the deity's power flow through you at greater intensity than the standard invocation allows.

system.benefits:
When using a Channel Divinity option, you may spend 4 Energy alongside the use to enhance the effect:

  • Damage options deal additional damage equal to your Wisdom × your Tier
  • Healing options restore additional HP equal to your Wisdom × your Tier
  • Control options (stun, zone, sanctuary, etc.) extend their duration by 1 minute
  • Fortune/Misfortune options apply to the next two rolls instead of one

usage.text: Optional 4 Energy cost when using Channel Divinity
